title: MR.REBORN
body:
🩸 Reborn – Enter the Deadlands  
Reborn is a Minecraft horror mod created with MCreator.  
It twists your world into a nightmarish landscape filled with new dangers, terrifying entities, and an atmosphere designed to keep you on edge at all times.  
This is not just Minecraft with a horror skin—this is Minecraft reborn through fear.  
👁 Features  
🌍 The Deadlands  
A cursed biome where reality is unstable.  
Corrupted skies, eerie fog, and unnatural sounds.  
Strange structures scattered across the land—ruins, ritual sites, and places best left unexplored.  
🕳 The Deadland Dimension  
A full nightmare dimension accessed through a custom portal.  
Home to twisted terrain, bloodstone soils, and constant dread.  
Dangerous mobs lurk here, but some rewards can only be found in this world.  
👹 New Entities  
MRREBORN – A terrifying stalker that hunts players in the dark. Rare but deadly, it is the embodiment of the mod’s horror.  
Plg – A corrupted creature, more common but no less disturbing. Think of them as twisted remnants of humanity.  
💀 Atmosphere & Overlays  
Custom GUI overlays (REBORN, WHY, G) simulate panic, hallucinations, and blood-curdling fear.  
Particles (REBORNSparticles) fill the air with unsettling effects like ash, ghostly wisps, or drifting spores.  
Random whispers, footsteps, and distortion keep you questioning what’s real.  
📜 Procedures & Advancements   
REBORNtalk – Triggers lore-driven hallucinations or messages when certain events happen. 
Advancements ("You", "REBORNReborn") – Guide your journey deeper into the nightmare.  
📥 Installation  
Download the latest version of Reborn.  
Place the .jar file into your mods folder.  
Launch Minecraft… if you dare.  
Reborn supports NeoForge (1.21.4) and may expand to Fabric/Quilt in the future.  
⚠️ Recommended Settings  
For the best horror experience:  
Play on Moody brightness.  
Use headphones for the 3D sound design.  
Play alone, at night.  
🐛 Issues & Feedback  
Since Reborn is made in MCreator, please report bugs, crashes, or balancing issues on our  
 Discord so they can be patched in future updates.  
🔮 Planned Updates  
More Deadland structures (ruins, dungeons, ritual sites).  
New stalker-type mobs with unique AI.  
Sanity system tied to overlays.  
Boss entity tied to the Deadland dimension.
